title: C.K 49144 Dextro VDE Slotted Screwdriver 4.0mm x 100mm
features: VDE tested to 10,000v to ensure completely safe working on live equipment up to 1000v
Grip tip technology that reduces the risk of cam out and slipping
Tip type marked on the end of the handle for easy identification
Ergonomically shaped head so it turns easily in the hand
Ridges along the head that gives better grip and extra power in that last quarter turn
Long fine neck for the ultimate fingertip control that's needed when turning machine screws
